_comment: Reference only. These go into Apps Script > Project Settings > Script Properties. Do NOT commit real keys. The Adzuna secret may be named ADZUNA_APP_KEY or ADZUNA_API_KEY - both are accepted.
RAPIDAPI_KEY: your-rapidapi-key-subscribed-to-JSearch (jsearch.p.rapidapi.com) - covers Indeed/LinkedIn/Glassdoor/PNet; leave unset to disable that source
CANDIDATE_JSON: optional - a JSON string overriding the default candidate profile in Config.gs
AGENCIES_CSV: optional - a name,email,focus CSV string to seed the Contacts tab on setup
